title: Embeddings
summary: Guide to creating embedding vectors for semantic search, retrieval, clustering, and similarity ranking.
raw:
Embeddings

Embeddings convert text into dense vectors so applications can compare meaning instead of relying only on exact keyword overlap.

Use embedding vectors for semantic search, retrieval augmented generation, clustering, deduplication, and nearest-neighbor lookups.

Similarity search

Store vectors for your corpus, embed the user query, and rank documents by cosine similarity or another vector distance.

embedding = client.embeddings.create(model="text-embedding-3-small", input="semantic search")

Pair vector search with lexical filters when exact terms still matter for precision.
